summary: Executed Phases 1-7 of the NixOS doc/config improvement plan: corrected the nandi/hamsa CPU-vendor factual bug, de-staled configuration.md/unstable-packages.md/how-to-add-package.md/how-to-add-service.md, fixed package-inventory docs (removed marker-pdf.nix, added opencode/kooha/slidev sections, python312->python3), swept emoji from eligible docs, made three conservative comment-only config cleanups, and created overlays/README.md. Phase 8 (Ryzen doc consolidation, niri testing-phase framing, niri.md emoji strip) was deliberately left untouched pending user confirmation. nix flake check passes.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary with verification results and plan deviations
Corrected nandi/hamsa CPU-vendor mislabel; added overlays/ directory bullet
De-staled File Structure tree, overlay heading, config/home shim descriptions
Repointed decision tree/examples to modules/; fixed overlay-file staleness
Repointed examples + service table to modules/; documented optional/host-toggled pattern
Removed marker-pdf.nix; added opencode/kooha/slidev sections; python312 -> python3
Fixed deleted-file reference and python312 mention
New file documenting all three overlays
Pruned 4 confirmed-configured items from dead comment block
Annotated dead historical stateVersion comment lines

completion_data.completion_summary: Corrected NixOS config documentation across README.md, docs/, packages/README.md, and created overlays/README.md; made three conservative comment-only config cleanups verified by nix flake check. Phase 8 deferred pending user confirmation.

next_steps: Consider spawning a follow-up task for the deferred Phase 8 items: Ryzen doc consolidation, niri.md testing-phase framing re-confirmation, and a dedicated niri.md emoji-strip task.
